name: Running Roadball
description: Tap Tap Music is a fast rhythm arcade game where players guide a glowing ball through neon tracks synced with music. Tap with perfect timing, avoid mistakes, collect gems, unlock new songs and balls, and chase higher scores through increasingly challenging levels. Simple controls, colorful 3D visuals, and addictive music gameplay make it easy to play and fun to master.
instructions: Tap or click to jump and change direction Time each tap with the music rhythm to stay on the track collect gems and complete the level
